title: AI 集成架构设计：分层自适应架构
summary: 定义前端直调与后端代理结合的分层自适应AI集成架构及组件
notes: Document is an architecture design specification with diagrams, data flows, component definitions, and risk tables. Lacks formal ADR markers (no Status/Decision/Consequences sections) but provides technical implementation contracts. Some ADR-like decision documentation but predominantly a technical specification.
